uncertainties.read: Field-split trust sheet. Present block = TYPE OF INCOME (Block C, 8 widely-separated columns: None / Dividends / Rent / Interest / Capital Gains / Excepted-Blind Trust / Tax Deferred / Partnership Income). Value, Amount-of-Income and Transaction blocks are on separate sheets and are null here; merge downstream by asset name. Asset slice = 'Ritu Ahuja Declaration of Trust', same 27 assets and same order as p.106 (which carried this slice's VALUE block). Income marks: all rows = Interest except rows 15 and 25 = None; Capital Gains co-marked on rows 3, 5, 11, 20. Income-type block is high-confidence (columns widely spaced, marks legible).
uncertainties.note: This clearer crop corrects several p.106 asset-name readings for the same rows: row 1 issuer = BEVERLY HLS CMNTY FCS DST SPL TX (not 'TRINITY'); row 6 = COVINA REVITALIZATION (not 'COMRA'). Row/date suffix digits across the muni-bond names remain partly degraded and best-effort.
owner carried from the p.106 slice reading (left-margin code read as SP but degraded; could be DC). Systematic if wrong.
